title: EtherChannel: LACP Trunk Onarımı (Po21) + STP Root (VLAN 10)
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
All necessary preconfigurations have been applied.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: Complete the tasks below by making changes to Sw10 only. No access is provided to Sw20 or Sw30.
Task 1: Sw20 is actively attempting to negotiate an 802.1Q trunking EtherChannel with Sw10 using LACP, but the channel is not functional. Resolve the issues on Sw10.
Task 2: Modify the spanning tree configuration to ensure that Sw10 is always the root for VLAN 10.
hints: Karsi taraf LACP 'active' + Po21: uyeler e0/0-1 'channel-group 21 mode active' olmali.
Eski Port-channel1'i 'no interface Port-channel1' ile sil.
answer_key_raw:
Sw10:
Sw10> enable
Sw10# configure terminal
Sw10(config)# no interface Port-channel1
Sw10(config)# interface range Ethernet0/0-1
Sw10(config-if-range)# switchport trunk encapsulation dot1q
Sw10(config-if-range)# switchport mode trunk
Sw10(config-if-range)# channel-group 21 mode active
Sw10(config-if-range)# no shutdown
Sw10(config-if-range)# exit
Sw10(config)# interface Port-channel21
Sw10(config-if)# switchport trunk encapsulation dot1q
Sw10(config-if)# switchport mode trunk
Sw10(config-if)# no shutdown
Sw10(config-if)# exit
Sw10(config)# spanning-tree vlan 10 priority 0
Sw10(config)# end
Sw10# write
explanation: Item 11'in varyantı: kanal numarası 21, üye portlar e0/0-1, STP root yalnızca VLAN 10 için. Yanlış Po1 silinir, üyeler dot1q trunk + LACP active ile Po21'e alınır, Po21 trunk yapılır, VLAN 10 priority 0.
